title: Chapter 207 – Blue
content:
Jeong Yeon-shin issued instructions regarding the duel challenges while sending a message to the Desolate Ma Family.

He requested they coordinate all family affairs to arrange a quiet meeting.

Lady Zhu Lianting, Ma Sei-in's mother, weighed on his mind. A royal descendant, she was inscrutable and authoritative.

Ma Yeon-jeok's consumption of the Great Rejuvenation Pill demanded utmost secrecy. Had it been Ma Jin, he would have grasped the intent between the lines instantly.

"As soon as a reply arrives, I must stand by Grandfather's side," Jeong Yeon-shin thought.

Meanwhile.

"There are four white-ranks who didn't join the City of Renowned Craftsmen mission, plus Hyeon Won-chang, making five in total. Likewise, two blue-ranks avoided the City of Renowned Craftsmen mission, bringing the blue-rank total to seventeen," Cheong Myeong reported in a clear tone.

Their positions had shifted.

Jeong Yeon-shin sat in the office chair. Facing a finely carved marble desk, Cheong Myeong and Baek Mi-ryeo sat opposite as guests.

Their chairs were smaller than the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's grand seat.

Even without tea, a tranquil atmosphere prevailed.

Had the matter not been grave, they might have brought out Tieguanyin.

"Seventeen blue-ranks and five white-ranks... It's a force that sits awkwardly between adequate and insufficient for a major faction's elite. It fits, and yet it doesn't. Originally, we had twenty-six blue-ranks and ten white-ranks. Unnamed disciples don't count as strength," Cheong Myeong said, his expression calm.

He showed no sentiment over the diminished force.

That stemmed from the deaths of comrades they had lived with like siblings.

Lamenting the loss of strength served no purpose, and expressing regret anew felt redundant after so long.

Baek Mi-ryeo, beside him, brushed her hair behind her ear.

"You've seen the ledgers, so you know. Fewer members naturally mean a smaller budget. The real issue is the limit on missions. Radiant Demon Wing can no longer handle Mount Hua Sect's twenty-four Plum Blossom Swordsmen. What was once a narrow gap has widened vastly. A Divine Sword Group squad unable to fully counter a major faction's elite will inevitably fall behind in merit," she explained evenly.

Her words were irrefutable — a cold assessment of their state.

Their ambiguous strength made deployment in major incidents impractical, which inevitably reduced their accrued merits.

This tied directly to the Radiant Demon Wing's prestige and hindered Jeong Yeon-shin's path to purple-rank.

Hence the weight of this discussion.

Cheong Myeong's aura was chillingly clear, and Baek Mi-ryeo's face bore no expression. They knew Jeong Yeon-shin's condition.

The new Radiant Demon Wing Leader spoke.

"We should aim for eighteen blue-ranks and seven white-ranks. That's where we start."

"Why?" Baek Mi-ryeo asked, her brow narrowing.

Cheong Myeong tilted his head slightly beside her.

Even white-ranks, let alone blue-ranks, possessed skills that were exceedingly rare in regional martial circles.

They were not common warriors. Only in a grand faction like Desolate Fortress would they be considered lower-tier, making recruitment far from simple.

Blue-ranks were exceptional. When Jeong Yeon-shin had borrowed Cheong Myeong's blue robes, he alone eradicated Shaanxi's Praying Mantis Sect.

A single treasured sword capable of facing down a mid-sized faction.

Desolate Fortress blue-ranks were the core strength of headquarters. No Leader relinquished them lightly.

When Jeong Yeon-shin had mentioned borrowing White Qilin Namgung Hwa-shin, Pure Heaven Wing Leader Ha Do-woon's sensitive reaction was only natural.

Reflecting now, Jeong Yeon-shin felt a twinge of regret.

He continued calmly.

"Forest-Treading Leader Senior Xiahou promised their transfer. There was an arrangement. Dawn Tree Sword Kang Chang-moo, Steel-Cutting Blade Wanderer Huo Yoon-cheol, and Deep Chivalry Fist Gongye Mi-ryeong will join us. Prepare to receive them. I'll be busy, so you two will need to handle it."

"You've been back a few hours...!" Baek Mi-ryeo exclaimed with a laugh-tinged sigh.

"You meant it? Sending duel challenges to the Leaders. Honestly, I wanted to dissuade you — losing would be humiliating — but I can't bring myself to now."

Cheong Myeong grinned. A rare smile since entering the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's office.

They had watched Jeong Yeon-shin shatter limits time and again. Surprise was no longer fresh.

Only pride remained. Baek Mi-ryeo's eyes curved into crescents, lightening the mood instantly.

"Earlier, some fool mentioned you not acting like a Leader. He'll be apologizing tomorrow," she said.

"Such a rash one came to greet me?" Cheong Myeong asked.

Even his gentle breeze-like aura softened into something blunter. Had Jeong Yeon-shin not worn black robes, he might have ruffled his hair.

The famed noble clansman swordsman laughed.

"Twenty-four would suffice. That many could handle missions against a major faction's elite smoothly. I know Dawn Tree Sword from his Forest-Treading days — he wields a blade well. You've gained a fine card."

"What's the progress on the City of Renowned Craftsmen Iron Clan's prosthetics?" Jeong Yeon-shin asked.

He recalled Ma Jin and Oh Wol-hyang. While his uncle had ascended to become the Desolate Ma Family head, blue-rank master Oh Wol-hyang remained with Radiant Demon Wing.

A woman who had treated Jeong Yeon-shin like a son since his initiation. Before losing her left arm at the City of Renowned Craftsmen, she was called the Benevolent Radiance Blade.

Baek Mi-ryeo smiled faintly.

"The energy prosthetic should be complete within a month. Don't worry about that."

"Good to know."

Relief washed over him. Nodding, Jeong Yeon-shin continued slowly.

"Let's focus on securing six blue-ranks. I need to gauge how many black-rank seniors I can handle."

"Preferably from your lineage, right? Easier to train. The stronger the squad, the better," Cheong Myeong said with a smirk.

He began counting on his slender fingers.

"Counting squads whose Leaders are resting... Blood Guardian and Immortal Tree Spirit each have three blue-ranks trained in your arts. It was chaos. Those with decent native techniques focused on Fate Defying Scripture; others took up Radiant Sword Style, Eternal Blossom Fist, or Radiant Wing Step. Some wandered over here for advice. Shin So-bin gained quite the following there."

"Shin So-bin...?" Jeong Yeon-shin echoed.

Her cat-like face came to mind. A spirited girl who even traded barbs with Lazy Flame Dragon.

A peer of Jeong Yeon-shin's age, she was the cherished gem of the Shin Clan under Desolate Fortress.

Her exceptional talent had earned her white robes and marked her as a successor to Jeong Yeon-shin's legacy. She was currently staying at her clan's pavilion, he had heard.

"I know she adopted my fist techniques," Jeong Yeon-shin said.

Cheong Myeong nodded.

"Regardless of robe color, she's a pioneer of your lineage. She excels at Eternal Blossom Fist and Radiant Wing Step. She practically worships you. Recently, she trounced her sister in Pure Heaven Wing — Shin Bin-bin. Apparently, her sister complained that you treated White Qilin like your subordinate."

"She challenged her to a duel over that?" Jeong Yeon-shin asked.

"Shin So-bin didn't hold back and got dragged back to her clan. When she was packing, her expression... she looked relieved. Anyway, plenty happened while you were gone."

"The Shin Clan overstepped. I'll bring her back soon," Jeong Yeon-shin said.

"Your calm tone is downright chilling," Cheong Myeong remarked, his smile deepening.

"Then let's talk Leaders. Blood Guardian Leader and Immortal Tree Spirit Leader... facing them as opponents offers no easy answers. Their prowess aside, their techniques are tricky. Blood Guardian Leader is a mysterious one — rumors abound. Some say he mastered evil arts; others claim he's the Blood Flame Sect Leader's ba*t*rd."

"I know Immortal Tree Spirit Leader well," Baek Mi-ryeo interjected. "She honed northern ice techniques. A master of ice arts, so beware her Internal Heavy Palm Technique. She excels at freezing a foe's insides. Her strikes are as ruthless as any evil faction master's, and she shuns personal ties with Han people. You'll need a life-or-death resolve to challenge her. Frankly, I'm worried."

Their words flowed on.

"Good," Jeong Yeon-shin thought.

He cherished such moments. Returning home to talk with his pseudo-siblings felt both rare and familiar. Discussing tense matters, his mind softened like melting wax.

Perhaps because he had endured the Alliance's hostility.

He parted his lips slowly.

"Evil arts and ice techniques? Then I have a chance."

***

***

The next day.

Three events erupted simultaneously.

The Radiant Demon Wing Leader's triumphant return from the Martial Alliance's Opening Tournament had been known even before his arrival.

Headquarters had been buzzing from the start. There was no need for fresh fanfare — it was already old news.

A new event here meant news that rivaled his victory.

First: the Forest-Treading Squad's masters' reassignment became known.

From Forest-Treading to Radiant Demon Wing.

Many had predicted that Radiant Demon Wing's weakness would persist under a new Leader.

The Divine Sword Group's foundation was forged by towering masters, after all.

The transfer of Dawn Tree Sword and the others shattered that forecast, sparking fervor.

"How could Forest-Treading Leader...?"

"He's not one to let go easily. A man of fierce pride. I drank with him once — his presence choked the air."

"Did he secretly duel Radiant Demon Wing Leader?"

"Thousand Fists Dragon Vassal lost? No way..."

"Whether it was a duel or not, some kind of wager took place. He wouldn't show such favor to a Han without cause."

"Then Radiant Demon Wing Leader must have won somehow. A mysterious figure. His feats at that age are extraordinary."

Whispers spread across Desolate Fortress's expanse.

Elite masters swapped tales, and high-ranking officials and merchants at headquarters eavesdropped eagerly.

The new Radiant Demon Wing Leader's profile began taking shape among civilians.

Second was the Breaking Guide's reveal.

This was not publicized externally. The Desolate Fortress Lord was no fool.

The Alliance had united hundreds of factions to counter Desolate Fortress. There was no need to draw the entire martial world's gaze.

Letters reached the Leaders: convene at Wish for Peace Sword Hall tomorrow.

Black-rank masters received the Lord's sealed orders simultaneously. Friendships existed among them.

The rare summons sparked countless guesses.

Divine Sword Deputy Leader and Forest-Treading Leader hinted at understanding but kept silent.

They focused on another matter.

["...Thus, this Leader humbly challenges Immortal Tree Spirit Leader Cheon So-so to a duel, proposing the victor's terms be followed as agreed."]

Jeong Yeon-shin's notice adorned Desolate Fortress.

This was not a personal matter. It represented the Radiant Demon Wing. There was no room to defer as a junior.

His words brimmed with boldness and provocation.

The content thundered like a cannon, yet the handwriting was neat — reminiscent of Ming dynasty standard regular script.

Master transfers within the Divine Sword Group were sensitive. These warriors were the pillars of headquarters.

A Leader had to heed the myriad gazes across the vast grounds, convincing even the uninvolved.

A Desolate Fortress Leader embodied headquarters itself.

Highly autonomous, yet bound by many ties.

Forest-Treading Leader's quiet decision had used one opportunity. Further moves required acknowledgment from the residents of headquarters.

Jeong Yeon-shin's notice detonated like a bomb.

Crowds gathered.

The central training ground swelled with hundreds — headquarters warriors mingling with visitors.

Artisans, merchants, officials, and servants pressed in. Immense tension pulled the air taut.

"I'm from near Shaanxi. They say the new Radiant Demon Wing Leader's swordsmanship is peerless. At his age, he's less man and more spirit."

"I'll broaden my insight with Immortal Tree Spirit Leader's Frost Heaven Flowless Ice Technique. It pacified the Outer martial circles, they say. Had I honed my ocular skills more, I wouldn't fear missing a thing..."

Curiosity and excitement boiled over.

A clash between Leader-grade masters was a spectacle even for martial novices.

A rare sight in one's lifetime. Even Desolate Fortress masters seldom witnessed such a thing outside black-rank promotion ceremonies.

On the duel platform, two Leaders faced off.

Radiant Demon Wing Leader, sinews bared on his left arm, and Immortal Tree Spirit Leader, ebony bangs veiling her brow.

Both clad in black robes, of similar height. Their auras were extraordinary, their presence kindred.

Energy waves rippling from their bodies flickered with transparent force. Only Immortal Tree Spirit Leader's leaf-tipped ears stood out.

Amid their silence, Jeong Yeon-shin spoke.

"Let's begin."

He felt no need for gratitude. Divine Sword Group Leaders always faced challenges. They could not refuse duels.

Desolate Fortress personnel affairs resembled combat. Jeong Yeon-shin, too, would one day receive a junior black-rank's challenge.

He knew little of Immortal Tree Spirit Leader Cheon So-so yet. Today's duel and tomorrow's Wish for Peace Sword Hall meeting would reveal her character.

For now, he knew one thing.

She scorned Han folk as deeply as Xiahou Wei-zhen did. Rarely speaking at Wish for Peace Sword Hall, she was deemed eccentric.

She conversed only with Ma Yeon-jeok, Grand Administrator Lin Jin-ming, the Divine Sword Group Leader, and Yue Shou-lin, it was said.

"..."

As expected, she did not reply. She merely stirred her internal energy in silence.

Rustle.

Her black robes fluttered under a sudden swell of energy. A divine white aura enveloped her.

Clad in cold winds like a northern blizzard immortal. The realm of energy manifestation. Her internal energy exuded immense mystique.

Gasps erupted from the crowd. Some exclaimed that the Nine Heavens Mysterious Maiden had returned.

Jeong Yeon-shin sensed it clearly. This was a divine technique.

"Luminous Wheel," he commanded, setting his heart's radiant cycle into motion.

Kiiing!

A sound reverberated within. The Luminous Wheel Technique's core spun like a whirlwind.

Internal energy from his middle dantian surged to his lower dantian below the navel. Stored power flared like lightning.

Externally, an auspicious energy wave blazed like wildfire.

The next instant.

Hoo—

His vision filled with Cheon So-so's face.

Her movement technique was blindingly swift. The gap closed in a flash. She favored quick resolutions, it seemed.

Their eyes met — her calm blue gaze glinting with frost-like radiance.

In his accelerated perception, her hair, flung by reactive energy, brushed his sidelocks.

A biting chill struck his face.

She yielded no first strike.

Whether that was her nature or unease toward Jeong Yeon-shin, he could not tell.

Hwaaa—!

From the side.

White wind swept in all directions. Like swirling snowflakes.

He had faced ice techniques before, but this unseen hand was of another caliber entirely.

A strange sensation tickled his upper dantian. Her technique bore a spiritual essence that amplified its might.

A divine skill, indeed. Only Luminous Wheel Technique could counter it.

Tszzzt.

His body dulled before contact. She wielded the Internal Heavy Hand Technique without touch. Unlike typical ice energy.

Cold seeped into his skin, stiffening meridians from the blood points upward. His black robes crackled as they froze.

She seemed to draw all moisture from the air around her. An utterly surreal sight.

In that fleeting moment.

Jeong Yeon-shin exhaled sharply. A single, brief breath.

Light flared within.

Luminous Wheel Technique raced through his minor meridians with fiery intensity. Pre-kindled energy flooded his meridians and blood points.

The energy's motion was ferocious. The wheel's spin was lightning itself.

Without invoking triple-flame evolution, a terrifying dynamism surged through him.

Then, as Jeong Yeon-shin seized Cheon So-so's right hand —

Crack!

The frost encasing them shattered upward.

Amid sunlight bathing them both, ice fragments scattered, casting seven-colored gleams.

"...?"

Cheon So-so's face showed expression for the first time. Slightly dazed.

"Now," Jeong Yeon-shin said, gripping her wrist with his left hand.

"This junior strikes."

Saaa—

Frost shards halted mid-descent. The Radiant Demon Wing Leader's robes fluttered ceaselessly.

An absorption-emission incantation born from full-body emission. A technique forged anew through Wind Body Movement Technique.

Ice fragments floated around his black robes like suspended stars.

Boom-boom-boom-boom—!

His right hand wove mystical patterns. From the Labor Palace and Lesser Mansion acupoints, opposing energies clashed like thunder, tearing the air apart.

Blood-point energy and mystic force from Luminous Wheel Technique roared like a storm.

Myriad Heavens Flower Rain, Brilliant River.

"...!"

Some discerning onlookers leapt to their feet.
